title: Senior Doctor - Drishti Eye Care - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Drishti Eye Care - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Drishti Eye Care, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Drishti Eye Care:
Drishti Eye Care is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Drishti Eye Care!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
